title: Blueberry Berbere Medley
description: A unique Moroccan-inspired dish featuring blueberries in a savory medley with berbere spice blend and other traditional Moroccan ingredients.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add cumin seeds and sauté for about 1 minute until fragrant.
Stir in minced garlic and finely chopped white onion, cooking until softened.
Fold in the Berbere Spice Blend, stirring well to combine with the onions and spices.
If using fresh blueberries, add them directly to the skillet. If using frozen blueberries, let them thaw slightly before adding to the mixture.
Continue to cook for about 5 minutes or until the blueberries begin to burst and release their juices.
Stir in the pitted dates if using. Reduce heat to low and cover with a lid.
Simmer gently for an additional 10-15 minutes, stirring occasionally, allowing the flavors to meld together.
Once done, transfer the mixture into individual serving dishes or onto cooked Jasmine Rice or Couscous as desired.
